meaning: adv.在(或向)城镇非商业区,在住宅区adj.住宅区的n.住宅区
examples: He rode uptown and made his way to Bob's apartment.
We walked uptown a couple of blocks until we found a cab.
Living in uptown New Orleans, Jacobs saw Katrina damage firsthand - his place was crushed by a tree.
Born on the island of Nissyros, Greece, Catsimatidis, 59, settled in uptown Manhattan as an infant.
